title: Principal HR & People Strategy Consultant
highlights: Design HR operating models, role architectures, and people analytics for scaling technology and Web3 organizations.
Work directly with founders, HR leaders, and boards on workforce planning, leadership roles, and governance.
Structure 8–16 week advisory and implementation sprints with clear decision points and measurable outcomes.

title: Head of People Strategy
highlights: Led people strategy across product, engineering, and operations during international expansion.
Introduced people analytics, succession planning, and calibrated performance processes.
Sponsored HRIS and ATS implementations aligned with regulatory and audit requirements.

title: Senior Consultant, HR Transformation
highlights: Delivered HR operating model, process, and technology projects for clients across financial services and technology.
Supported global rollouts of performance frameworks, talent programs, and shared service models.
Worked with cross-functional teams spanning HR, finance, risk, and operations.
